targets.rawSql: SELECT sum(rows) AS value FROM system.parts WHERE active AND database = currentDatabase() AND table IN ('market_bar_raw', 'market_bar_canonical', 'market_quote_latest')
SELECT uniqExact(symbol) AS value FROM (SELECT symbol FROM market_bar_raw FINAL UNION ALL SELECT symbol FROM market_bar_canonical FINAL UNION ALL SELECT symbol FROM market_quote_latest FINAL)
SELECT sum(bytes_on_disk) AS value FROM system.parts WHERE active AND database = currentDatabase() AND table IN ('market_bar_raw', 'market_bar_canonical', 'market_quote_latest')

SELECT uniqExact(market) AS value FROM (SELECT market FROM market_bar_raw FINAL UNION ALL SELECT market FROM market_bar_canonical FINAL UNION ALL SELECT JSONExtractString(payload_json, 'market') AS market FROM market_quote_latest FINAL) WHERE market != ''
SELECT if(count() = 0, 0, dateDiff('second', max(observed_at), now())) AS value FROM market_quote_latest FINAL

SELECT layer, rows FROM (SELECT 'raw' AS layer, count() AS rows FROM market_bar_raw FINAL UNION ALL SELECT 'canonical', count() FROM market_bar_canonical FINAL UNION ALL SELECT 'latest_quotes', count() FROM market_quote_latest FINAL)

SELECT market, count() AS rows FROM (SELECT market FROM market_bar_raw FINAL UNION ALL SELECT market FROM market_bar_canonical FINAL UNION ALL SELECT JSONExtractString(payload_json, 'market') AS market FROM market_quote_latest FINAL) WHERE market != '' AND ('$market' = 'All' OR market = '$market') GROUP BY market ORDER BY rows DESC

SELECT interval, count() AS rows FROM (SELECT interval, market FROM market_bar_raw FINAL UNION ALL SELECT interval, market FROM market_bar_canonical FINAL) WHERE ('$market' = 'All' OR market = '$market') AND ('$interval' = 'All' OR interval = '$interval') GROUP BY interval ORDER BY rows DESC

SELECT symbol, any(market) AS market_name, interval, count() AS canonical_rows, min(bar_time) AS first_bar, max(bar_time) AS last_bar, dateDiff('day', min(bar_time), max(bar_time)) AS span_days FROM market_bar_canonical FINAL WHERE ('$market' = 'All' OR market = '$market') AND ('$interval' = 'All' OR interval = '$interval') AND ('$symbol' = 'All' OR symbol = '$symbol') GROUP BY symbol, interval ORDER BY canonical_rows DESC LIMIT 200

SELECT layer, source, count() AS rows, uniqExact(symbol) AS symbols, min(observed_at) AS first_observed, max(observed_at) AS last_observed FROM (SELECT 'raw_bars' AS layer, source, symbol, market, interval, observed_at FROM market_bar_raw FINAL UNION ALL SELECT 'latest_quotes' AS layer, source, symbol, JSONExtractString(payload_json, 'market') AS market, '' AS interval, observed_at FROM market_quote_latest FINAL) WHERE ('$market' = 'All' OR market = '$market') AND ('$symbol' = 'All' OR symbol = '$symbol') AND (layer = 'latest_quotes' OR '$interval' = 'All' OR interval = '$interval') GROUP BY layer, source ORDER BY rows DESC

SELECT toStartOfHour(ingested_at) AS time, source, count() AS rows FROM market_bar_raw FINAL WHERE $__timeFilter(ingested_at) AND ('$market' = 'All' OR market = '$market') GROUP BY time, source ORDER BY time

WITH ordered AS (SELECT symbol, market, interval, bar_time, lagInFrame(bar_time) OVER (PARTITION BY symbol, interval, adjustment ORDER BY bar_time ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS previous_bar FROM market_bar_canonical FINAL WHERE ('$market' = 'All' OR market = '$market') AND ('$interval' = 'All' OR interval = '$interval') AND ('$symbol' = 'All' OR symbol = '$symbol')), measured AS (SELECT *, dateDiff('second', previous_bar, bar_time) AS gap_seconds, multiIf(interval = '1m', 60, interval = '5m', 300, interval = '15m', 900, interval = '30m', 1800, interval IN ('60m','1h'), 3600, interval = '1d', 86400, 0) AS expected_seconds FROM ordered) SELECT symbol, any(market) AS market_name, interval, countIf(previous_bar IS NOT NULL AND expected_seconds > 0 AND gap_seconds > if(interval = '1d', toFloat64(expected_seconds) * 4.0, toFloat64(expected_seconds) * 1.5)) AS unexpected_gaps, maxIf(gap_seconds, previous_bar IS NOT NULL) AS max_gap_seconds FROM measured GROUP BY symbol, interval HAVING unexpected_gaps > 0 ORDER BY unexpected_gaps DESC LIMIT 200

SELECT table, sum(rows) AS physical_rows, uniqExact(partition_id) AS active_partitions, sum(bytes_on_disk) AS bytes_on_disk FROM system.parts WHERE active AND database = currentDatabase() AND table IN ('market_bar_raw','market_bar_canonical','market_quote_latest') GROUP BY table ORDER BY table

SELECT layer, physical_rows, logical_rows, physical_rows - logical_rows AS superseded_versions FROM (SELECT 'raw' AS layer, (SELECT count() FROM market_bar_raw) AS physical_rows, (SELECT count() FROM market_bar_raw FINAL) AS logical_rows UNION ALL SELECT 'canonical', (SELECT count() FROM market_bar_canonical), (SELECT count() FROM market_bar_canonical FINAL) UNION ALL SELECT 'latest_quotes', (SELECT count() FROM market_quote_latest), (SELECT count() FROM market_quote_latest FINAL))

SELECT dataset, source, count(*) AS artifacts, sum(byte_size) AS bytes, min(ingested_at) AS first_ingested, max(ingested_at) AS last_ingested FROM marketcow_production.raw_artifact_manifest GROUP BY dataset, source ORDER BY artifacts DESC LIMIT 200

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT market FROM (SELECT market FROM market_bar_canonical FINAL UNION ALL SELECT JSONExtractString(payload_json, 'market') AS market FROM market_quote_latest FINAL) WHERE market != '' ORDER BY market
list.label: Market
list.name: market
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT market FROM (SELECT market FROM market_bar_canonical FINAL UNION ALL SELECT JSONExtractString(payload_json, 'market') AS market FROM market_quote_latest FINAL) WHERE market != '' ORDER BY market

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT interval FROM market_bar_canonical FINAL ORDER BY interval
list.label: Interval
list.name: interval
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT interval FROM market_bar_canonical FINAL ORDER BY interval

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT symbol FROM (SELECT symbol, market FROM market_bar_canonical FINAL UNION ALL SELECT symbol, JSONExtractString(payload_json, 'market') AS market FROM market_quote_latest FINAL) WHERE ('$market' = 'All' OR market = '$market') ORDER BY symbol
list.label: Symbol
list.name: symbol
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT symbol FROM (SELECT symbol, market FROM market_bar_canonical FINAL UNION ALL SELECT symbol, JSONExtractString(payload_json, 'market') AS market FROM market_quote_latest FINAL) WHERE ('$market' = 'All' OR market = '$market') ORDER BY symbol
